channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: WRATH: Aeon of Ruin VR – Brutal Edition launches April 9
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS VR2
  • PS5
  • Quest

Virtual reality first-person shooter dated.

Virtual reality first-person shooter WRATH: Aeon of Ruin VR – Brutal Edition will launch for PlayStation VR2, SteamVR, and Quest 2 and 3 on April 9, publishers 3D Realms and Fulqrum Publishing, and developers KillPixel and Flat2VR Studios announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Flat2VR Studios:

About

The Old World is rotting. Its Guardians have fallen. The corruption spreads.

You are the Outlander, pulled from the Ageless Sea and bound to a grim purpose by the Shepherd of Wayward Souls. Enter ancient ruins and dead forests. Tear through swarms that hunt in packs. Keep moving, keep firing, keep cutting, or the gloom takes you.

Brutal Edition is WRATH rebuilt and enhanced for virtual reality, driven by a simple philosophy: deliver a more visceral experience. Expect enhanced dynamic movement, over-the-top combat, ramped-up bullet effects, and a helluva lot of blood. This edition also restores and refines the experience with wide-ranging improvements to combat feel, audio, effects, and overall polish. It’s the definitive way to play Wrath and you’re going to make a damn big mess doing it!

WRATH: Aeon of Ruin VR – Brutal Edition is built for speed and pressure. It is circle-strafing panic, close-range brutality, and constant decision-making. Which hand is clearing space? Which hand is landing the shot? When to slide, when to dash, when to throw an artifact and take the opening it creates.

Key Features

  • Built for Virtual Reality Combat
    • Dual-Wielding at the Core – Bring two weapons into the fight and run the battlefield your way.
    • Physical Reloads and Handling – Reload with a quick flick of the wrist and stay sharp when the pressure spikes.
    • Two-handed Control Rewards – Stabilize your weapon for better control, tighter spread, and access to alt-fire where available.
    • Blade Dash, Rebuilt for Virtual Reality – Charge and launch with your blade for fast repositioning and advanced movement.
    • High-Velocity Slide – Keep momentum through tight spaces and turn movement into a weapon.
  • Artifacts You Can Feel
    • Physical Artifacts With Unique Interactions – Select an artifact and use it like an object, not a button prompt.
    • Throw, Break, Deploy – Bring dark tools into the fight and use them under fire.
  • A World Made of Dread and Secrets
    • Non-Linear Levels Stuffed With Hidden Routes – Explore crypts, sunken ruins, corrupted temples, and cursed wilds.
    • Old-School Structure, Modern Virtual Reality Flow – Big spaces, brutal fights, constant tension.
    • In-Run Difficulty Options – Tune damage values on the fly without stripping the world bare.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/wrath-aeon-of-ruin-vr-brutal-edition-launches-april-9
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR launches in Early Access for SteamVR on April 23
item.content:encoded:
• PC

FlatOut is back... in virtual reality!

Virtual reality off-road racing game FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR will launch in Early Access for SteamVR on April 23, publisher Flat2VR Studios and developer Strategy First announced. A full release is planned across PlayStation VR2, SteamVR, and Quest.

Here is an overview of the game, via Flat2VR Studios:

About

FlatOut is back—-and this time, it’s in virtual reality!

FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR, where reckless driving has never been this much fun.

FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR blends everything everyone has ever loved about FlatOut into one offering, plus virtual reality. Gamers will also be introduced to all new and exciting features, game modes, and vehicles which will soon become personal favorites. Another installment of nitro fueled demolition and derby racing featuring a variety of tracks, modes, arenas and multi-player options are available. Welcome back to FlatOut!

Key Features

  • High-speed racing and collisions on a variety of tracks and environments.
  • Customizable Cars – Gamers will unlock 27 cars to customize and race, including tributes to fan favorites and new additions to the garage.
  • Gamepad controller support.
  • Dynamic Tracks – FlatOut 4: Total Insanity VR features 20 tracks including traditional derby racing, time trials, arenas, assault levels, carnage levels and much more.
  • Destructible Environments – Chaos and destruction return to the world of racing with high speed collisions and wild destructible environments.
  • The Legendary Stunt Mode – Featuring 12 stunts in total. Six new stunts and six re-imagined classic stunt mini-games await fans in search of epic crashes and death-defying maneuvers.
  • Arena Mode – Three game play styles including Death Match, Capture the Flag and Survivor.
  • New Assault Mode – An arsenal of deadly weapons at your disposal to slow or destroy opponents.
  • Single Player – Race, Destroy and enjoy Stuntman mode offline before showing off your skills in multiplayer.
  • Multiplayer Mayhem – Competitive online modes allow up to eight players to master destruction arenas, race courses and set traps.
  • Hot Seat Mode – Take turns with your family and friends in hot seat competition of Stunts.
  • Thumping Indie Soundtrack – FlatOut features a global range of over 35 amazing indie music tracks.

Watch a new trailer below.

Early Access Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/flatout-4-total-insanity-vr-launches-in-early-access-for-steamvr-on-april-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: EverQuest Legends announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Daybreak Game Company and developer Game Jawn have announced EverQuest Legends, a fan-driven collaboration designed to give players a new way to experience classic EverQuest. It will launch for PC in July. Sign-ups for the April closed beta test are available now via the official website.

EverQuest Legends takes players back to the early days of the massively multiplayer online RPG with “restored sound and visuals” and “all-new quality-of-life enhancements designed to make it more approachable for new and returning adventurers.”

“EverQuest Legends is a passion project for me,” said Daybreak Game Company executive producer David Youssefi in a press release. “I’ve dreamt of a solo / casual version of EverQuest for over 20 years. The opportunity to bring that dream to life in collaboration with a group of our biggest and most passionate fans is truly epic. We’ve put a lot of love and hard work into making a game that honors the legacy of EverQuest while forging new experiences for players of all stripes to enjoy. We hope old school fans and new adventurers alike will enjoy the magic and wonder of Norrath in EverQuest Legends!”

Game Jawn founder Eda Spause added, “I’ve been playing EverQuest since the turn of the century and have been an active member of its incredible community ever since. Our team has been pinching ourselves since we were given the opportunity to work with our favorite game and leave our own mark on the world we’ve loved for decades.”

Here s an overview of the game, via Daybreak Game Company:

About

EverQuest Legends has been designed from the ground up to appeal to players who enjoy playing their games solo and / or casually. While groups (up to four players) and raids (up to eight players) are available, the entire game can be played, enjoyed, and experienced solo if that’s your playstyle.

In keeping with this approach to the game, EverQuest Legends provides players with the ability to create immensely powerful characters by, among other things, selecting up to three active different classes per character (for example, you can make a rogue/paladin/wizard) and utilizing new ways to upgrade weapons and armor. As you level up and improve your gear in EverQuest Legends, you will eventually gain the ability to take on the most difficult game content, whether alone or with a small group of friends.

Whether you’re an existing EverQuest player, a former player, or a new player that has never experienced the world of Norrath, EverQuest Legends offers the opportunity to enjoy everything classic EverQuest has to offer, plus a lot more! At launch, EverQuest Legends will feature the continent of Antonica (pre-Kunark), and all of the EverQuest playable races (including Iksar, Frogloks, and Kerran), all featured in the original EverQuest art style, including the classic graphics, zones, spell effects, loot, and music … plus more than a few new surprises!

Key Features

  • Experience Classic EverQuest – EverQuest Legends features all of the magic and nostalgia of classic EverQuest, including the original art style, graphics, zones, spell effects, loot, and music. Enjoy the game as it hasn’t been seen, heard, or experienced in over 20 years.
  • Modern Game Features – EverQuest Legends features tons of modern game features, including a streamlined user interface, upgraded spell and ability management, and countless other quality of life enhancements.
  • Forge Your Legend – EverQuest Legends allows players to create unique characters by selecting up to three classes at a time, with all of the benefits, stats, spells, and abilities that come with each class. You can also upgrade your gear (up to +10) and swap and combine different focus, click, and proc effects on your gear. With 15 available races and 560 possible class combinations, the possibilities for forging the ultimate character are virtually endless.
  • Adventure… Your Way – With the additional power provided to player characters and the many benefits of a modernized gaming experience, EverQuest Legends makes it possible for players to progress through the game at their own pace and to forge their own adventures, whether alone or with others. While small groups (up to four players) and raids (up to eight players) are possible, even a solo player can build a character strong enough to take on the toughest challenges and acquire the most epic gear in the game.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/everquest-legends-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Open-world virtual reality flying adventure game Compass announced for PS VR2, SteamVR, and Quest
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS VR2
  • PS5
  • Quest

Due out this spring.

Trebuchet has announced open-world virtual reality flying adventure game Compass for PlayStation VR2, SteamVR, and Quest. It will launch this spring.

Here is an overview of the game, via Trebuchet:

About

Compass is an open-world virtual reality flying adventure set among whimsical, pillowy skies. You are the new Scout for a wandering Caravan, tasked with charting safe routes along the Skypath. Your mission is simple: help your crew deliver a mysterious Egg to the great Incubator.

But when an encounter with a formidable beast scatters your friends, it’s up to you to bring everyone back together. Pilot your hand-crafted speeder across carrot-topped isles, navigate shifting weather, restore the skies’ Harmony, and reunite with your lost companions in a world full of floating wonders.

Key Features

  • Pilot Your Speeder – Take the sticks of your speeder and navigate through soft mists and vast open reaches. Activate Relays right from your cockpit to clear the path forward, dock at the traveling garage to apply new paint jobs, and brave the dangers looming ahead.
  • Restore Harmony – Leave the cockpit and use your hand grapples to swing through ruins and complete ancient puzzles. Activate Amplifiers to upgrade your speeder, help the locals restore their homes, and make the world sing again.
  • Scout the Unknown – Find your scattered crew like Captain Nym and Chladni the navigator while dodging rogue machines. Discover the secrets of the skies and guide your Caravan safely home.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/open-world-virtual-reality-flying-adventure-game-compass-announced-for-ps-vr2-steamvr-and-quest
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: MOUSE: P.I. for Hire physical and digital editions announced
item.content:encoded:
PlaySide Publishing and developer Fumi Games have detailed physical and digital editions for noir cartoon-inspired first-person shooter MOUSE: P.I. for Hire, as well as announced that the PlayStation 4, Xbox One, and Switch versions will arrive sometime after the game’s PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC (Steam, Microsoft Store) debut on April 16. The Xbox and Microsoft Store PC versions will support Xbox Play Anywhere.

The game will be available in the following editions:

  • Physical Editions – available July 10
    • Standard Edition – $29.99 for PlayStation 5, $39.99 for Switch 2
      • A copy of the game
        • Full game on card for Switch 2
    • Deluxe “Mouseburg Edition” – $49.99 for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC, $59.99 for Switch 2
      • A copy of the game
        • Steam code in a box for PC
        • Full game on card for Switch 2
      • A seven-inch vinyl record with four tracks from the official game soundtrack, featuring all-original tunes from composer Patryk Scelina, in addition to a brand-new track created for the game by electro swing icons, Caravan Palace
      • A double-sided poster (340mm x 340mm) featuring a map of Mouseburg on the front and a schematic of Jack Pepper’s trusty “Micer” pistol on the back
      • A printed MOUSE: P.I. for Hire comic book, including two sticker sheets
      • 33 Mouseburg baseball trading cards, inspired by the in-game minigame
      • Three premium Mouseburg postcards
  • Digital Editions – available April 16
    • Standard Edition – $29.99 across all platforms
      • A copy of the game
    • Digital Deluxe Edition – $39.99 across all platforms
      • A copy of the game
      • Access to the first downloadable content expansion due out at a later date
      • The full original game soundtrack, featuring all-original tunes from composer Patryk Scelina, in addition to a brand-new track created for the game by electro swing icons, Caravan Palace
      • A digital MOUSE: P.I. for Hire comic book

Pre-orders for the physical editions are available now across various retailers. The Steam version is also available to pre-order.

View images of the game’s box art and “Mouseburg Edition” at the gallery.

Images

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/mouse-p-i-for-hire-physical-and-digital-editions-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
